## TRM1.2. Additional time in taxi-in phase (PI#5)

Lisbon and Porto are the only Portuguese airports subject to the monitoring of this indicator.

The additional time in Lisbon in 2025 was equal to 1.83 min/arr, and in Porto to 1.61 min/arr.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 1.79 min/arr.
